personal.name: Rakshitha R
personal.title: Computer Science Engineer | Cybersecurity | IoT | Cloud Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Aspiring cybersecurity and cloud engineer building secure, scalable, and intelligent systems.
personal.bio: Final-year Computer Science Engineering student specializing in IoT, Cybersecurity, and Blockchain. Skilled in Python, cloud platforms, and secure system design. Passionate about building scalable, secure, and intelligent solutions with real-world impact. Actively seeking opportunities to contribute to innovative engineering teams.
personal.currentRole: Final Year B.E. Computer Science Student
personal.currentRoleDescription: Specializing in IoT, Cybersecurity, and Blockchain with hands-on experience in building secure applications, IoT systems, and cloud-based solutions.

about.title: About
sections: I am a final-year Computer Science Engineering student with a strong focus on Cybersecurity, IoT, and Cloud Computing. I enjoy building secure and scalable systems that solve real-world problems.
I have hands-on experience in Python development, encryption techniques, IoT-based safety systems, and voice-enabled automation. My work emphasizes security, efficiency, and usability.
I actively participate in coding competitions, cybersecurity workshops, and technical communities to continuously improve my skills and stay updated with industry trends.

experience.title: Computer Science Engineering Student (IoT & Cybersecurity)
experience.company: Alva’s Institute of Engineering and Technology
experience.description: Built strong foundations in cybersecurity, cloud computing, and IoT systems. Developed multiple academic and real-world projects focused on secure application design, automation, and system optimization.

projects.title: SecretVault — Secure File Management System
projects.description: Developed a secure file encryption system using Python.
projects.longDescription: Designed and implemented a secure file management system using encryption techniques to protect sensitive data. Integrated password-based authentication and ensured data confidentiality, integrity, and secure access.

projects.title: Voice-Activated Personal Assistant
projects.description: Built an intelligent voice-controlled automation system.
projects.longDescription: Developed a voice-enabled assistant using Python, APIs, and speech recognition to automate system tasks and user queries. Focused on modular architecture, user privacy, and efficient task execution.

projects.title: Gas Leakage Detection & Alert System
projects.description: Engineered an IoT-based real-time gas leak alert system.
projects.longDescription: Built an IoT-based safety system using Arduino, MQ sensor, and GSM module to detect gas leaks and send real-time SMS alerts. Improved safety response time and enabled proactive hazard detection.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.), Computer Science (IoT & Cybersecurity including Blockchain)
education.institution: Alva’s Institute of Engineering and Technology
